MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff S. R.'s Motion Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Serve Doe Defendants.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Plaintiff S. R.'s Motion Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Serve Doe Defendants is Off calendar for failure to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). The court acknowledges on the record that courtesy copies were received after the court had posted its tentative ruling, but a proposed order was not received.
